summary: The 'Run prettier' CI job failed because the file packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js was not formatted with prettier. The prettier check script detected the unformatted file and exited with code 1.
root_cause: packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js has not been formatted with prettier and must be reformatted before committing.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
    Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The prettier check script explicitly states the project requires prettier formatting and instructs the developer to run yarn prettier-all.
This is the specific file identified by the prettier check as needing formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The prettier-check command exited with a non-zero code, causing the CI job to fail.
Confirms this step is the one that failed, matching the job name 'Run prettier'.

suggested_fix: Run 'yarn prettier-all' locally, then add the reformatted packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js to the commit.
